level.description:
Level of the block, at which the transfer was made.  
**[sortable]**

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the block, at which the transfer was made.

ticket.description:
Ticket info.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

from.description:
Sender account.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

to.description:
Recipient account.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

transactionId.description: Internal TzKT id of the transaction operation, caused the ticket transfer.

transferTicketId.description: Internal TzKT id of the transfer_ticket operation, caused the ticket transfer.

smartRollupExecuteId.description: Internal TzKT id of the smart_rollup_execute operation, caused the ticket transfer.
